title: EV/EBITDA by Sector: Enterprise Value Multiples 2026
description: One sector trades at 5x EBITDA while another demands 20x. We mapped the valuation gap across all 11 GICS sectors to spot the opportunities.

schemas.headline: EV/EBITDA by Sector: Enterprise Value Multiples 2026
schemas.description: Compare enterprise value to EBITDA multiples across all GICS sectors. EV/EBITDA is a capital-structure-neutral valuation metric preferred by M&A analysts.
